behavior_summary: This script implements event handlers for the NPC Kothius. For U8P_KOTHIUS::look, use, enterFastArea, leaveFastArea, and cast events it annotates the running process with identity/context for 'Kothius', excludes that process from normal processing, and forwards the interaction to shared handlers (SORCERER::* and SPELCMBT::084D) via spawn.

The handlers do not implement detailed dialogue, AI or spell logic themselves; they delegate to common engine modules. The spawn return value is captured and used as a condition (via an 'implies'-style op) before the handler suspends.
cast forwards a spell identifier (uword) along with actor context to SPELCMBT::084D to resolve and execute the spell.
notable_control_flow: Event handler begins by setting process info (string 'Kothius') and calling a process-exclude operation — acting as a guard/annotation for the spawned routine.

Each handler pushes caller pid and the actor reference (and in cast the spell id), then performs spawn of an external routine. The spawn return value is used as a conditional ('implies' semantics) and then the handler suspends/returns.
Handlers are event-driven (U8P_KOTHIUS::look/use/enterFastArea/leaveFastArea/cast) and operate primarily as thin delegators to shared external code.
open_questions: Exact semantics of the 'process exclude' operation and its long-term effects on the NPC (inferred to prevent further processing but not proven).
Precise behavior implemented by the referenced SORCERER routines (039C, 05EC, 258C, 25D2) — inferred to be dialogue/AI/greeting/farewell but not shown here.
Meaning of the spawn return value and how the 'implies' condition affects subsequent game state or control flow in the caller context.
Whether any global flags elsewhere depend on these handlers completing, since this fragment does not read or write globals.

main_function.name: U8P_KOTHIUS::look
main_function.purpose: Handle the 'U8P_KOTHIUS::look' (examine) interaction directed at NPC Kothius by tagging the process/actor as Kothius, excluding the process, and delegating the detailed behavior to SORCERER::039C.
entry_conditions: Event 0 — invoked when the player/avatar or another actor 'looks at' or examines Kothius.

function_map.name: U8P_KOTHIUS::look
function_map.role: Main 'U8P_KOTHIUS::look' event handler: tag process as 'Kothius', exclude process, push pid and actor ref, spawn SORCERER::039C to perform detailed behavior.

function_map.name: U8P_KOTHIUS::use
function_map.role: Handle 'use' event: same tagging/exclusion pattern and spawn SORCERER::05EC to perform activation/interaction.

function_map.name: U8P_KOTHIUS::enterFastArea
function_map.role: Handle fast-area entry: tag/exclude and spawn SORCERER::258C to perform fast-area entry behavior (greeting/trigger).

function_map.name: U8P_KOTHIUS::leaveFastArea
function_map.role: Handle fast-area exit: tag/exclude and spawn SORCERER::25D2 for exit behavior (farewell/cleanup).

function_map.name: U8P_KOTHIUS::cast
function_map.role: Handle 'cast' event (uword): tag/exclude, push pid, push spell id, push actor ref, and spawn SPELCMBT::084D to resolve/execute the spell.

external_calls.purpose: Perform NPC-specific 'U8P_KOTHIUS::look' interaction (dialogue/animation/behavior). The handler only prepares context and delegates the work.
Perform NPC-specific 'use' interaction/activation behavior. Delegated by the use handler.
Handle entry into a fast trigger area for the NPC (greeting/trigger effects or AI change).
Handle leaving a fast trigger area for the NPC (farewell/cleanup or AI revert).
Resolve and execute a spell cast directed at or by the NPC using the supplied spell id and context.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script implements event handlers for the NPC Kothius. For U8P_KOTHIUS::look, use, enterFastArea, leaveFastArea, and cast events it annotates the running process with identity/context for 'Kothius', excludes that process from normal processing, and forwards the interaction to shared handlers (SORCERER::* and SPELCMBT::084D) via spawn.
